## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Validation
- [ ] Relevant tests run locally
- [ ] Manual verification completed (if applicable)

List commands and results:
- `pytest ...`

## Definition of Done Checklist
Reference: docs/ChangeChecklist.md

### Scope and Behavior
- [ ] Change matches issue scope and expected behavior
- [ ] Edge cases reviewed
- [ ] User-facing messages verified

### Automated Tests
- [ ] Tests updated
- [ ] Regression coverage added (if bug fix)
- [ ] Relevant pytest targets pass

### Manual Test Assets
- [ ] tests/manual_tests/checklist.html updated (if needed)
- [ ] tests/manual_tests/test_barcodes.html updated (if needed)

### Documentation
- [ ] docs/DeveloperReadme.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] docs/VolunteerInstructions.md volunteer section updated (if needed)
- [ ] docs/VolunteerInstructions.md admin section updated (if needed)

## Related Issues
- Closes #
- Related #
